commands.title: List all active sessions
commands.description: Shows all active sessions with ID, type, connection info.

commands.title: List sessions verbose (detailed info)
commands.description: Shows sessions with extended details including UUID, platform, check-in time.

commands.title: Search/filter sessions
commands.description: Filters session list. E.g. 'last_checkin:less_than:10s session_id:5 session_type:meterpreter'

commands.title: Interact with a specific session (enter meterpreter)
Background the current session (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Runs from within the meterpreter session to return to msfconsole.

commands.title: Kill a specific session by ID
Upgrade a shell session to meterpreter
commands.description: Auto-uploads and executes a meterpreter payload to upgrade a basic shell to full meterpreter.

commands.title: Run a command on a specific session
commands.description: Runs a shell command on the specified session from msfconsole without interacting.

args.name: command
args.description: Command to run on all sessions

commands.title: Run a command on ALL sessions simultaneously
Run a meterpreter command on a session
commands.description: Runs a specific meterpreter command (not shell) on the session from msfconsole.

commands.title: Run a post module against a session
commands.description: Runs a post-exploitation module automatically against the specified session.

commands.title: Set a response timeout for a session
Get system info from meterpreter session
commands.description: Run from within an active meterpreter session (after sessions -i).

commands.title: Spawn an interactive system shell (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Opens a cmd.exe (Windows) or /bin/sh (Linux) on the target via the session.

commands.title: Execute a single command (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Runs a command on the target system and returns output. No interactive shell needed.

commands.title: Execute a command with arguments (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Runs a command with arguments. Use -a for args.

commands.title: Upgrade shell to PTY (Linux meterpreter)
commands.description: Spawns a bash with interactive PTY for proper shell experience on Linux targets.

commands.title: Migrate to another process (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Moves the meterpreter session into another process to hide or gain privileges.

commands.title: Check user idle time (from meterpreter)
commands.description: Shows how long the user has been idle on the target desktop.

commands.title: Add a route through a session (pivoting)
commands.description: Routes traffic to the target subnet through the specified session. Enables scanning/exploiting internal hosts.

args.name: target
args.description: Host and port to connect to

commands.title: Connect to a host through session (netcat-like)
commands.description: Opens a TCP connection from msfconsole to the target, useful for testing pivots.

commands.title: Run a resource script (automation)
commands.description: Runs a series of commands from a .rc file. Useful for automating post-exploitation.

commands.title: Log console output to a file
commands.description: Start logging all console output to a file. Use 'spool off' to stop.

commands.title: Save active datastore to disk
commands.description: Saves current variable settings (RHOSTS, LHOST, etc.) for next session.
